title: Federal, Provincial, Territorial - Canada.ca
content:
## Federal, Provincial, Territorial
The Federal, Provincial, Territorial (FPT) Committee on Pest Management and Pesticides was established to help strengthen FPT relationships in the area of pest management and pesticides. The Committee also provides advice and direction to FPT governments on programs, policies and issues.
For any information regarding the FPT Committee please contact the Federal, Provincial, Territorial Secretariat .
- Pesticide Education, Training and Certification

## Meeting Notes and Reports
Consistent with Government principles of openness and transparency, meeting notes or reports are available upon request by contacting the Pest Management Information Service .
- Association of American Pesticide Control Officials
- Federal, Provincial, Territorial Links
- Healthy Lawns Strategy
